content.full_text:
State of California

Memorandum

To: File

Date: 2-1-78

From: FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
        Gale Baker

Subject: Telephone Advice

Jerry Seedbourg from Assemblyman Gary Hart's office (805/966-1766) called to ask if honoraria received by the Assemblyman would be reportable if given to a charity. Ted said that under 82030(b)(4), if the honoraria were given to a charity within 30 days after receipt and not claimed as a tax deduction, there would be no obligation to report it as income.

Handwritten note: "honoraria given to charity is not reportable income"
